strengths: Over 18 years of comprehensive software and infrastructure engineering experience, easily surpassing the 15-year minimum requirement.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as a founder, coupled with hands-on builder fluency in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Proven track record of inspiring developers internally and externally through public speaking, organizing coding dojos, and designing technical workshops.
concerns: AI-specific experience appears relatively recent and lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
Past roles have primarily been at the Senior or Staff level, which may require a step up to meet the strategic scope of a Director-level IC.
Lacks explicit evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cloud and AI adoption at an executive level.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly compelling candidate for this Principal Engineer role due to his 18+ years of deep, polyglot software and infrastructure engineering experience, which comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum. His recent work building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators demonstrates the exact hands-on AI builder fluency requested, while his entrepreneurial background as a founder highlights his ability to drive technical innovation. Furthermore, his extensive history of hosting workshops, giving conference talks, and organizing coding dojos proves he can inspire teams and share disruptive insights, making him a remarkably strong fit for this strategic technical leadership position.
